title: Bulk RNA Isolation (Ding)
steps: Add 1 ml Trizol to ~10 mg tissue.
Add 200 µL chloroform
Vortex for 1 min until homogenous.
Incubate at room temperature for 5 min
Spin samples in microcentrifuge at 12,000 rpm for 20 min. at 4°C
Transfer ~500 µL of clear (aqueous) top phase to a new 1.5 mL tube.
Add 500 µL of cold 2-propanol to the 1.5 mL tube.
Vortex for 30 sec. to mix 2-propanol/sample.
Put samples in –20°C for 3–24 hrs.
Spin samples in microcentrifuge at full speed for 20 min. at 4°C
Remove supernatant from tube.
Add 1 mL 80% Ethanol and vortex for 10 sec.
Spin samples in microcentrifuge at full speed for 5 min. at 4°C
Remove supernatant from tube.
Let tube sit at room temperature with top open for 5 min. to evaporate excess ethanol.
Add 87.5 µL of RNase-free water to the RNA pellet.
vortex for 5 min. to resuspend RNA, making sure that pellet is completely dissolved.
Spin in centrifuge briefly (Flash) to collect entire sample at the bottom of the tube.
Add 10 µL Buffer RDD and 2.5 µL DNase I (Qiagen)
Incubate on the benchtop (20–25°C) for 10 min.
Add 10 µL beta-mercaptoethanol per 1 mL buffer RLT
Add 350 µL Buffer RLT with beta-mercaptoethanol to the sample and mix well
Add 250 µL of 96–100% ethanol to the diluted RNA and mix well by pipetting.

Transfer the sample (700 µL) to an RNeasy MinElute spin column placed in a 2 mL collection tube, close the lid gently, and centrifuge for 15 sec. at 10,000 rpm at room temperature. Discard the flow-through.

Place the RNeasy MinElute spin column in a new 2 mL collection tube. Add 500 µL buffer RPE to the spin column. Close the lid gently, and centrifuge for 15 sec. at 10,000 rpm at room temperature. Discard the flow-through.
Add 500 µL of 80% ethanol to the RNeasy MinElute spin column. Close the lid gently, and centrifuge for 2 min. at 10,000 rpm at room temperature. Discard the flow-through and collection tube.

Place the RNeasy MinElute spin column in a new 2 mL collection tube. Open the lid of the spin column, and centrifuge at full speed for 5 min. at room temperature. Discard the flow-through and collection tube.

Place the RNeasy MinElute spin column in a new 1.5 mL collection tube. Add 14 µL RNase-free water directly to the center of the spin column membrane. Close the lid gently, and centrifuge for 1 min. at full speed at room temperature.
creator: Reyka Jayasinghe
